title: Dark Indulgent Vietnamese Turkey Neck Ca Kho To
description: A charred, flaky, and indulgent Vietnamese dish featuring turkey neck, ferment, and low-sodium-friendly ingredients, formed into a traditional ca kho to style.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, palm sugar, black pepper, garlic, shallots, and Thai chilies.
Add the turkey neck to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Transfer the turkey neck to a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the turkey neck from the oven and brush with rice vinegar.
Return the turkey neck to the oven and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until charred and flaky.
While the turkey neck is baking, combine water and chopped scallions in a small saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the scallion mixture for 5 minutes.
To serve, place the turkey neck on a plate and spoon the scallion mixture over the top.
